operator.tagline: Founder-operator building the sovereign experience economy through metaMe, metaKnyts, The Qriptopian, Qc, iQubes, and the Agentic Polity.

strategy.headline: Blueprint Operation metaWill in Q1, expand the founder-operator model in Q2, and package Venture Lab proof by Q3.
strategy.thesis: Operation metaWill is the June 1, 2026 launch program for proving the metaProof operating stack as a repeatable venture-growth system. The Polity remains the North Star, but Q1 is a blueprinting quarter rather than a premature expansion quarter. The four Q1 blueprints are: Cartridge Blueprinting, centered on the Media Cartridge with metaKnyts as the anchor mythos/commercial instance and The Qriptopian as the ethos/logos extension; Experience Blueprinting, centered on metaMe Runtime, aigentMe, personal blended doors, cartridges, myCanvas, remixing, publishing, Qc starter bundles, and iQube-governed context; Operating Blueprinting, centered on using aigentMe to operate Operation metaWill itself for the founder operator; and Venture Growth Blueprinting, centered on proving revenue, adoption, partner growth, Qc micropayments, premium KNYT bundles, franchise offers, and Venture Lab proof. Q2 should expand from proven internal blueprints into external founder-operator recruitment. Q3 should consolidate capital readiness, Studio-led spin-out proof, Runtime and Qc fast-follower paths, and the 2027 legal/metaCommons preparation.
blockers: Avoid over-expanding before Q1 blueprints are proven and repeatable.
Keep Studio light/internal in Q1 rather than turning it into the primary commercial surface too early.
Ensure Qc micropayments remain simple enough for users to understand and habit-form.
Keep premium KNYT product sales and franchise offers complementary rather than bundled into confusion.
Translate Polity strategy into concrete cartridge, runtime, operating, and venture-growth blueprints.
constraints: June 1 is a blueprinting-quarter launch, not a mass external onboarding launch.
Use only validated mainnet Qc/iQube flows for user-facing economic actions.
Human approval is required for outbound communications, payments, access-policy changes, and public posting.
Confidential Operation metaWill strategy should not be exposed in public-facing copy.
Q1 metrics should emphasize metaKnyts, metaMe, Qriptopian, and Qc signals; Polity Cartridge remains qualitative.

ventures.name: Operation metaWill
ventures.tagline: The internal launch program for blueprinting and scaling the sovereign experience economy.
ventures.northStarKpi: Four Q1 blueprints reach v1 quality and produce clear Q2 external founder-operator expansion criteria.

objectives.title: Publish the Q1 Blueprinting Charter
objectives.summary: Reframe June 1 through August 31 as the Blueprinting Quarter with four blueprint tracks and a clear proof-capture cadence.

objectives.title: Create the Operation metaWill proof-capture system
objectives.summary: Capture evidence from cartridge, experience, operating, venture growth, micropayment, Pulse, and sales workflows.

objectives.title: Define Q2 external founder-operator expansion criteria
objectives.summary: Translate Q1 blueprint proof into requirements for recruiting external founder operators in Q2.
successCriteria: Minimum viable Media Cartridge Blueprint defined
Minimum viable Venture Growth Blueprint defined

partners.name: Zero KNYTs
partners.role: early access cohort for franchise and patronage paths

ventures.notes: This is the umbrella execution program. It should not become a broad public brand too early. Public surfaces should talk about the three domains—Mythos, Logos, Ethos—and the personal blended door.

ventures.name: metaMe Runtime and aigentMe
ventures.tagline: The Logos spine: a sovereign runtime and founder-operator execution layer.
ventures.northStarKpi: Internal founder-operator workflows are repeatedly executed through aigentMe with Qc-powered actions and clear proof capture.

objectives.title: Create the metaMe Experience Blueprint v1
objectives.summary: Document how metaMe Runtime, cartridges, myCanvas, remixing, publishing, Pulse paths, Qc starter bundles, and iQube-governed context form a repeatable sovereign experience.

objectives.title: Create the aigentMe Operating Blueprint v1
objectives.summary: Use aigentMe to operate Operation metaWill itself, proving how the founder operator receives briefs, NBEs, specialist handoffs, communications support, and proof capture.
successCriteria: NBE patterns grounded in Venture iQube objectives

objectives.title: Implement the personal blended-door onboarding model
objectives.summary: During metaMe setup, classify each user's Mythos, Logos, and Ethos balance and generate a personalized starter path.

ventures.notes: metaMe Runtime is the central door and spine, not merely one of three equal doors. aigentMe is the founder-operator guide and operating agent. Studio remains mostly internal/light in Q1, supporting runtime, myCanvas, admin customization, remixing, and publishing rather than being externally commercialized.

ventures.name: metaKnyts Media Cartridge
ventures.tagline: The Mythos anchor and first commercial media-cartridge proof instance.
ventures.northStarKpi: Premium KNYT and franchise sales motions produce repeatable evidence for the Media Cartridge Blueprint.

objectives.title: Create the Media Cartridge Blueprint v1 using metaKnyts as instance 1
objectives.summary: Define the repeatable cartridge pattern for content, Codex, Pulse, PCS, premium products, franchise offers, iQubes, Qc payments, remixing, and founder-operator activation.
successCriteria: Premium and franchise sales tracks separated
Cartridge revenue and proof loops documented

objectives.title: Run the premium product-sales track
objectives.summary: Lead high-ticket product sales through First KNYT, ZeroKNYT, and Satoshi Collection bundles while treating buyers as potential franchise and metaMe prospects.

objectives.title: Run the founder-operator franchise offer track
objectives.summary: Use the three metaKnyt founder-operator franchise offers as the primary operating-position sales track, separate from premium book/Codex product bundles.
successCriteria: Three franchise offers live in KNYT store

partners.name: Zero KNYTs
partners.role: exclusive early access and high-conviction sales cohort

ventures.notes: Premium bundles sell the mythos stake. Franchise offers sell the operating position. metaMe activates both. The franchise offers intentionally do not include book and Codex bundles so that the premium product and franchise tracks can complement and cross-sell each other.

ventures.name: The Qriptopian Codex and Pulse
ventures.tagline: The Ethos door and civic media layer for Polity alignment.
ventures.northStarKpi: The Qriptopian contextualizes metaKnyt and metaMe traction while proving Qriptopian Pulse as the correspondent pathway.

objectives.title: Document The Qriptopian as the second Media Cartridge instance
objectives.summary: Show how The Qriptopian extends the media cartridge from Mythos into Ethos and Logos through Codex content, Polity papers, Pulse, Qc content flows, and correspondent pathways.

objectives.title: Stabilize Polity content status in Qriptopian Codex
objectives.summary: Maintain the 16 Polity-related WIP papers as a seeded Codex base while flagging the Qripto protocol papers and first Polity series for future refinement.
successCriteria: 16 WIP Polity papers visible in Codex
Public explanation drafted without overloading users

objectives.title: Draft and send the broader community update
objectives.summary: After the Zero KNYT communication, send a broader progress update explaining activation, mainnet infrastructure, gated early franchise access, premium paths, Pulse, and metaMe personalization.
successCriteria: Zero KNYT early access framed clearly
No confidential Operation metaWill strategy exposed

ventures.notes: The Qriptopian should not carry primary Q1 quantitative burden. It contextualizes, aligns, and explains the Polity while providing Pulse and Codex proof.

ventures.name: QriptoCENT / Qc Micropayments
ventures.tagline: The live micropayment rail for content, tools, agents, consultations, and contribution.
ventures.northStarKpi: Live Qc usage is demonstrated across Mythos, Logos, and Ethos flows during Q1.

objectives.title: Capture mainnet Qc flow proof across the three domains
objectives.summary: Use live Qc micropayments for at least one Mythos, Logos, and Ethos flow such as KNYT content/remix, aigentMe/tool/inference turn, and Qriptopian content/Pulse action.

objectives.title: Design and test Qc starter bundles
objectives.summary: Use the proposed 10,000 Qc treasury activation pool and 50 Qc sign-on bonuses to help users experience content, tool turns, consultations, and contribution flows.

objectives.title: Collect Qc fast-follower spin-out evidence
objectives.summary: Capture why Qc can become a standalone or fast-follower Venture Lab product based on live micropayment behavior across content, agents, inference, and contribution.
successCriteria: Fast-follower thesis integrated into Venture Lab proof pack

ventures.notes: Qc is not a feature; it is the live bridge that proves the sovereign experience economy can price content, tools, consultations, inference, remixing, and contribution at micro-scale. The moneypenny binding is the canonical Qc / treasury / micropayments surface; metaMe, KNYT, Qriptopian, and Venture Lab remain partner/use-case surfaces rather than cartridge-binding workarounds.

ventures.name: metaMe Studio Internal Enablement
ventures.tagline: The internal composition layer supporting Q1 blueprints and lead spin-out proof.
ventures.northStarKpi: Studio is evidenced as the repeatable composition layer without becoming the primary external Q1 commercial play.

objectives.title: Keep Studio light but visible as internal Q1 enablement
objectives.summary: Use Studio capabilities behind myCanvas, workbench, remixing, admin customization, publishing flows, and super-admin tooling to support the blueprints.
successCriteria: No premature external Studio commercialization in Q1

objectives.title: Prepare Studio lead spin-out proof
objectives.summary: Use Q1 internal blueprinting evidence to show why Studio is the lead Venture Lab spin-out opportunity.

ventures.notes: Studio remains the lead spin-out opportunity, but Q1 should primarily use the studio surface internally to build and prove blueprints through myCanvas, workbench, remixing, publishing, admin customization, and Studio super-admin capabilities.

ventures.name: metaMe Venture Lab and Spin-Out Strategy
ventures.tagline: The venture-scaling layer for Studio, Runtime, Qc, and media cartridge replication.
ventures.northStarKpi: Venture Lab proof pack supports Studio as lead spin-out and Runtime/Qc as fast followers by Q3.

objectives.title: Create the Venture Growth Blueprint v1
objectives.summary: Show how premium KNYT, franchise offers, metaMe activation, Qriptopian alignment, Qc usage, iQubes, Marketa, and specialist agents combine into repeatable venture growth.

objectives.title: Document spin-out sequence and evidence
objectives.summary: Maintain Studio as lead spin-out, with metaMe Runtime and Qc as fast followers, before metaKnyt franchises or legal/metaCommons verticalization.
successCriteria: Media cartridge as proof venture documented

ventures.notes: Q1 focuses on internal blueprinting and proof. Q2 recruits external founder operators based on blueprints. Q3 consolidates spin-out and capital-readiness evidence.

ventures.name: Polity Strategy Cartridge
ventures.tagline: The qualitative compass and North Star alignment layer for Operation metaWill.
ventures.northStarKpi: Commercial growth increases sovereignty, agency, and Polity coherence rather than diluting them.

objectives.title: Operate the Polity Cartridge as a qualitative compass in Q1
objectives.summary: Track strategic coherence, sovereignty alignment, agent rights/constraints/obligations, citizen/operator formation, and whether revenue activity supports the Polity thesis.
successCriteria: No heavy quantitative dashboard burden in Q1

objectives.title: Keep legal/metaCommons as 2027 deep commons path
objectives.summary: Preserve legal/metaCommons as the Polity's first deep commons vertical while keeping Q1 focused on media cartridge blueprinting.
successCriteria: Legal/metaCommons held as strategic roadmap item
Not allowed to distract from media-cartridge Q1

partners.name: Metayé / Metaiye Media
partners.role: Polity emissary and media partner frame

ventures.notes: The Polity Strategy Cartridge remains a qualitative strategic compass in Q1. The legal-metacommons binding records the 2027 deep-commons vertical as a real forward dependency while Qriptopian, Venture Lab, AgentiQ OS, and metaMe remain the current operating surfaces for Polity alignment.

ventures.name: AgentiQ OS and iQube Registry Path
ventures.tagline: The open builder path and primitive-quality layer supporting future expansion.
ventures.northStarKpi: AgentiQ OS and the iQube Registry support the blueprint without distracting from Q1 operating proof.

objectives.title: Map the iQube Registry and AgentiQ OS support role
objectives.summary: Clarify how iQubes, ContentQubes, ToolQubes, AigentQubes, and future Registry paths support the Q1 blueprints and Q2 external builder/onboarding path.
successCriteria: No Q1 over-expansion into broad developer GTM

ventures.notes: AgentiQ OS and the iQube Registry / RegistrySupply surface remain critical infrastructure. In Q1 they support internal blueprinting; Q2/Q3 can expand into more external builder onboarding once the blueprints are proven.

ventures.name: Marketa Growth Engine
ventures.tagline: The strategic marketing and growth specialist layer for Operation metaWill.
ventures.northStarKpi: Marketa converts the blueprints into clear outreach, revenue, partner, and adoption motions without over-broadening Q1.

objectives.title: Coordinate Q1 growth communications
objectives.summary: Support Zero KNYT follow-up, broader community update, premium/franchise messaging, Qriptopian framing, and founder-operator narrative.

objectives.title: Create the Q2 partner/founder-operator growth map
objectives.summary: Use Q1 blueprint learnings to identify which partners and external founder operators should be recruited in Q2.

partners.name: Marketa
partners.role: growth, outreach, and strategic marketing specialist

ventures.notes: Marketa should be used internally in Q1 to prove the growth operating model, not just to create generic marketing content.

today.focus: Finalize the Venture iQube and align it to the Q1 Blueprinting Quarter.

actions.title: Review and approve this Venture iQube structure for aigentMe ingestion
Confirm whether the allowed cartridge enum needs v0.2 additions for polity, studio, registry, qcent, and legal-metacommons
